changeSet.author: moryzang
changeSet.comment: 修正 tournament_task 字段语义：tournament_id=配置ID，event_game_id=玩法ID
changeSet.sql: UPDATE tournament_task tt LEFT JOIN tournament_config tc_by_id ON tc_by_id.id = tt.tournament_id LEFT JOIN tournament_config tc_by_event ON tc_by_event.event_game_id = tt.tournament_id SET tt.event_game_id = COALESCE(tc_by_id.event_game_id, tc_by_event.event_game_id, tt.event_game_id), tt.tournament_id = COALESCE(tc_by_id.id, tc_by_event.id, tt.tournament_id) WHERE tt.event_game_id IS NULL;
